Option.Name: PerfTestWithWin64
Option.Description: Enable the Win64 configuration for performance tests.

Option.Name: PerfTestWithWin64Vulkan
Option.Description: Enable the Win64 Vulkan configuration for performance tests.

Option.Name: PerfTestWithWin64EmulateStereo
Option.Description: Enable the Win64 EmulateStereo configuration for performance tests.
